metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/405","TITLE":"The Public Bodies (Joint Working) (Integration Joint Boards) (Scotland) Amendment Order 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/405","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.xht","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/made/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/405/contents/made","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-19T09:02:25Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-19T08:57:07.413557Z","DocumentMainType":"ScottishStatutoryInstrument","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"405","ISBN":"'9780111064757'","AlternativeNumber":"","CreationDate":"2025-12-17","SUBJECT":"PUBLIC HEALTH,SOCIAL CARE","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"PUBLIC HEALTH,SOCIAL CARE","SUMMARY":"This Order amends the Public Bodies (Joint Working) (Integration Joint Boards) (Scotland) Order 2014 (the 2014 Order). Article 2(2) provides that integration joint board members, appointed under article 3(6) of the 2014 Order to represent third sector bodies, service users and unpaid carers, can vote at board meetings. Article 2(3) and (4) make corresponding amendments relating to the resignation of members and proxy voting.","":""}
